title: Peloton Interactive (PTON) Stock Forecast & Analyst Price Targets
text: Peloton Stock Analysis Forecast and Valuation. Analyst Consensus: According to StockAnalysis, the consensus rating for Peloton is Buy, reflecting analyst confidence in the turnaround narrative. Price Target Range: Price targets range significantly from $4 to $55, with an average price target of approximately $10. Valuation Metrics: The company's transition to profitability enables traditional valuation metrics (P/E, EV/EBITDA) to be applied for the first time in years. Revenue Forecast: Analysts expect revenue to stabilize around $2.4 billion in fiscal 2026, representing a slight decline from prior years but with improved margins. Earnings Growth: Forward earnings are expected to improve significantly as the company achieves profitability and operational leverage. Cash Flow: Free cash flow generation is expected to accelerate, providing flexibility for capital allocation decisions. Market Position: Peloton's market position in home fitness has stabilized, with the connected fitness category representing a sustainable business despite post-pandemic normalization.
